name: DeepSeek-R1 671B
archDisplay: DeepSeekMoE: 256 routed + 1 shared expert, top-8 routing, 61 layers (3 dense + 58 MoE), Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA)
note: Open reasoning flagship trained with RL on top of V3-Base; matched OpenAI o1 on math/code and triggered a historic US tech-stock selloff on release.
tpsNote: 671B MoE far exceeds a single 24GB 4090; Q4_K_M alone needs ~404GB, so real deployments use multi-GPU servers or heavy CPU offload (Unsloth's 1.58-bit dynamic quant fits ~131-170GB for partial-offload rigs).
